  • Services
    Software Development
    🏗️ Custom Software Full-cycle product engineering 🏢 Enterprise Platforms ERP, HRMS & integrations 🤝 Custom CRM Zero per-seat-fee internal tools
    Web Development
    💻 Web Development React, Next.js & full-stack 📰 WordPress & CMS Custom themes & headless CMS 🛍️ E-commerce Shopify, WooCommerce & headless
    Mobile Apps Development
    📱 Mobile Apps iOS, Android & cross-platform 🤖 Android App Development Native Android applications 🍎 iOS App Development Native iPhone & iPad apps 🪶 Flutter Development Single codebase, native performance 🌐 PWA Development Progressive Web Apps ⌚ Wearable App Development Apple Watch & Wear OS 🔄 Cross-Platform App Dev React Native & Flutter 🎮 Mobile Game Development Unity & 2D/3D games ⚡ Native Mobile App Dev High-performance native code 📐 App Prototype & Strategy UI/UX & technical scoping
    AI Development
    ⚙️ AI Automation LLMs, RAG & intelligent workflows 🤖 AI Agents & Chatbots LangChain & autonomous agents 🎙️ AI Voice Agents Inbound/outbound voice AI 🔄 Workflow Automation n8n, Zapier, Make ⚡ AI Development Custom AI systems for MSMEs
    Cloud Development
    ☁️ Cloud & DevOps AWS, Azure, GCP migration
    Cybersecurity
    🔒 Cybersecurity Compliance, audits & zero-trust

  • Industries
    FinTech & Banking
    💳 Payment Gateways Secure transaction processing 🪪 KYC & Onboarding Systems Identity verification workflows 🛡️ Fraud Detection Engines Real-time anomaly detection 🏦 Loan Management Systems Origination to servicing 📋 Compliance & Reporting Regulatory dashboards & audit trails
    Healthcare
    🏥 Electronic Health Records Patient data management (EHR) 📅 Appointment Scheduling Booking & calendar systems 🩺 Telemedicine Platforms Remote consultation & video visits 🔐 HIPAA-Compliant Data Systems Secure health data storage 🧾 Medical Billing & Claims Insurance claims processing
    E-Commerce & Retail
    🛒 Storefront & Checkout Cart, payment & order flow 📦 Inventory Management Stock tracking & replenishment 🚚 Order Fulfillment Picking, packing & shipping ⭐ Loyalty & Rewards Platforms Customer retention programs 🏷️ Product Information (PIM) Catalog & attribute management
    Logistics & Supply Chain
    🚛 Fleet Tracking & Telematics Real-time vehicle monitoring 🗺️ Route Optimization Shortest path & fuel savings 🏭 Warehouse Management (WMS) Storage & pick/pack systems 📍 Last-Mile Delivery Tracking Live delivery status & ETA
    EdTech & Learning
    🎓 Learning Management (LMS) Course delivery & tracking 👩‍🎓 Student & Learner Portals Dashboards & progress views 🧠 Adaptive Learning Engines Personalized learning paths 📝 Assessment & Certification Exams, grading & credentials
    Real Estate & PropTech
    🏠 Property Listing & CRM Lead & deal management 🔭 Virtual Tour Platforms 360° property walkthroughs 📄 Lease & Tenant Management Contracts & rent tracking 📐 Plot & Inventory Tracking Land records & availability maps
    Media & Entertainment
    📺 Streaming & CMS Platforms Video delivery & content mgmt 🔑 Subscription & Paywall Membership & gated content 💬 Fan Engagement Tools Community & social features ©️ Digital Rights Management Content protection & licensing 📢 Ad Serving & Monetization Programmatic ad platforms
    Travel & Tourism
    ✈️ Booking & Reservation Flights, hotels & packages 🗓️ Itinerary Planning Tools Trip builder & scheduling 🔗 Channel Management (OTA) Multi-platform distribution 💰 Dynamic Pricing Systems Demand-based rate optimization

    Domain-Specific Expertise

    We build secure, compliant systems tailored to industry standards.

    See Case Studies →
  • Technologies
    Frontend & Mobile
    ⚛️ React Component-based UI library for building dynamic, highly responsive web interfaces. ⏭️ Next.js The React framework for production. Server-rendered by default for incredible performance and SEO. 🌊 Tailwind CSS Utility-first CSS framework for rapidly building custom designs without leaving your HTML. 📘 TypeScript Strongly typed programming language that builds on JavaScript to catch errors early. 🪶 Flutter Google's UI toolkit for building natively compiled applications for mobile from a single codebase. 📱 React Native Framework for building native apps using React. 🎯 Kotlin Modern, expressive programming language for Android development. 🕊️ Swift Powerful and intuitive programming language for iOS, iPadOS, macOS, tvOS, and watchOS.
    Backend & Databases
    🟢 Node.js Asynchronous event-driven JavaScript runtime designed to build scalable network applications. 🐍 Python Versatile, high-level programming language dominating the data science and AI ecosystems. 🐹 Go Statically typed, compiled language known for extreme performance and concurrent processing. 🐘 PostgreSQL The world's most advanced open source relational database. 🍃 MongoDB Document-based, distributed database built for modern application developers. 🔥 Firebase App development platform backed by Google. 📀 Turso (libSQL) Edge-hosted distributed SQLite database.
    AI & Automation
    ♊ Google Gemini Google's highly capable, multimodal AI models. 🧠 Claude API Anthropic's family of AI models focused on safety, steerability, and long context. 🔗 LangChain Framework for developing applications powered by language models. ⚡ Groq The LPU Inference Engine providing blazing fast AI speeds. 📚 RAG & Vector Search Retrieval-Augmented Generation using vector databases to ground AI in your private data.
    Cloud & DevOps
    ☁️ AWS The world's most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. 🟦 Microsoft Azure Cloud computing platform with deep enterprise integration. 🌐 Google Cloud Suite of cloud computing services offered by Google. 🌩️ Cloudflare Workers Serverless execution environment running on Cloudflare's global network. 🐳 Docker Platform for developing, shipping, and running applications in containers.
    CMS & E-Commerce
    📰 WordPress The world's most popular content management system. 🛍️ Shopify Leading global commerce company providing trusted tools to start, grow, market, and manage a retail business. 🛒 WooCommerce Customizable, open-source e-commerce platform built on WordPress. 🔌 Headless CMS Content management systems that separate the backend content repository from the frontend presentation layer.

HOW WE HELP

Practical tools that make you money

📱

Smart Websites & Mobile Apps

Beautiful, fast websites and apps that your customers actually find on Google. Mobile-first design, WhatsApp-integrated, and ready to take orders — not just look pretty.

🤖

WhatsApp AI Assistant

Auto-reply to inquiries, send booking confirmations, and capture leads while you sleep. Your business runs 24/7.

📊

Custom CRM & Dashboard

Replace spreadsheets with a real system. Track leads, sales, inventory, and staff — all in one place.

📍

Local SEO & Google Business Profile

Get found when customers search "near me." We optimize your Google Maps listing, build local citations, and make sure your business shows up before your competitors — organically, no ads needed.

THE DIFFERENCE

Stop bleeding money. Start growing.

😤 The Old Way

❌ Customer calls go unanswered after hours
❌ Leads written on paper, lost in a week
❌ No online presence — invisible on Google
❌ Bills & invoices created manually in Excel
❌ Staff operations tracked via WhatsApp groups
❌ Paying ₹50K/month for a "digital marketing agency" with no results
VS

🚀 The Trai Inc Way

✅ WhatsApp AI bot replies instantly, captures every lead
✅ Custom CRM tracks every customer, never loses a deal
✅ SEO-optimized website — ranked on Google page 1
✅ Automated GST invoicing in one click
✅ Staff dashboard with attendance & task tracking
✅ One-time affordable build + optional monthly support

COST CALCULATOR

What Will It Cost?

Get a transparent, instant estimate. No hidden fees, no surprise invoices. We price honestly so you can budget confidently.

✔ No lock-in contracts
✔ Fixed-price contracts with advance payment
✔ Free 30-day post-launch support

₹0

Estimated starting cost. We'll WhatsApp you a detailed quote!

SUCCESS STORIES

Real problems. Real solutions. Real growth.

Chitravan Resort

From paper bookings to a real-time CRM

Problem: Losing track of bookings on paper, missing follow-ups, and double-booking rooms during peak season.

Solution: A custom CRM and booking engine with real-time sync, automated WhatsApp guest confirmations, and a staff dashboard.

CRMWhatsAppHospitality
Bhu Master

Zero lead leakage for a real estate firm

Problem: Managing hundreds of real estate leads via scattered spreadsheets. Sales team losing hot leads daily.

Solution: A fully digital real estate lead management platform with auto-assignment, follow-up reminders, and pipeline analytics.

Lead ManagementReal EstateAutomation
CMS City Montessori School

Digital presence for the world's largest school

Problem: Outdated web presence that didn't reflect the school's global reputation. No structured admission inquiry system.

Solution: Modern, SEO-optimized website with integrated admission forms, WhatsApp inquiry routing, and parent portal.

WebsiteSEOEducation
